title: Our Vision, Mission and Values
content:
Our Vision, Mission and Values

Vision

Our vision is to be a pioneering, desired and exemplary university that directs the social development of our country, region, and humanity, and to contribute to the shaping of a better future with our academic, social, and cultural activities.

Mission

In the light of our corporate values, which we have developed based on our ancient/national culture, by building an internationally qualified teaching and research environment, we aim to raise people who are respectful for beliefs, adhere to ethical values, sensitive to the fundamental problems of our country, region and humanity, are solution-oriented, open to development, and have high awareness of professional and social responsibility.

Our values

Respect for beliefs

Adherence to ethical values
